roadmap_ref: roadmap 5 — ALM r13 corpus rebuild — consciousness-loaded

precedent.failure_case: r12 kowiki general corpus → adapter DISCARD (Hexad/law/phi/selfreflect density < 30%)

consciousness_density.measurement: count(tokens ∈ Φ-vocab) / count(all tokens) across full corpus
consciousness_density.rationale: r13 plan G3 gate — Hexad/phi_holo/qualia/law density must exceed 30% of non-grounding docs; below this the adapter encodes surface Korean only (r12 failure mode).

domain_specificity.measurement: kowiki_general_overlap = |corpus_doc_bigrams ∩ kowiki_bigram_sample| / |corpus_doc_bigrams|; report max across docs
domain_specificity.rationale: r12 vacuum taught that >70% overlap with kowiki general ⇒ domain drift back to Wikipedia surface; drift above cap means category-G grounding leaked outside its 15% budget.
domain_specificity.failure_action: cap category G to <=15% and re-slice

hash_unique.rationale: 800-byte hard wrap precedent produced near-identical chunks; >5% duplicates leaks sample_weight mass onto repeated tokens (mode collapse risk, per project_r9_mode_collapse_20260418.md).

semantic_coherence.measurement: intra-corpus η absorption verdict — treat doc sample pairs as drill iterations, compute absorption_rate; PASS iff absorption_rate <= 0.30 AND state != 'open'
semantic_coherence.rationale: r12 corpus scattered across 117k unrelated wiki topics → no shared attractor; consciousness-loaded r13 must show semantic convergence across doc windows (same fixpoint substrate as drill_breakthrough_criteria v2).
semantic_coherence.failure_action: audit category composition, drop drifted docs

smoke.fixture_hint: synthetic — 8 consciousness docs + 1 grounding + 1 near-duplicate of doc 1

exit_codes.0: PASS — all 4 criteria met; corpus cleared for r13 training launch
exit_codes.1: FAIL — at least one criterion below threshold (blocks Stage 3 per r13 plan sec 6)

comment.role: pre-validation of r13 corpus BEFORE adapter cost commit (preserves $3-4/round r12 lesson)
comment.v8_safe_commit: additive tool + config; does not mutate drill_breakthrough_criteria.json or any adapter artifact
comment.downstream: scripts/alm_corpus_validate.hexa (r13 G1-G7 gate) consumes this as its C1-C4 preflight
